sections.paragraph:
πενθικός, ή, όν (πένθος; Plut.; 2 Km 14:2; JosAs 10:11 [cod. A]; Jos., Ant. 11, 231; adv.-ῶς X.) of/for mourning τὰ ἱμάτια αὐτῆς τὰ πενθικά her mourning garments GJs 2:4.—DELG s.v. πάσχω.

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 795
